case_title: KELKRIS ASSOCIATES INC, VS. MELODIE L. GONSALVES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELKRIS ASSOCIATES INC, DBA CREDIT BUREAU ASSOCIATES

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELKRIS ASSOCIATES INC, DBA CREDIT BUREAU ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT GONSALVES, MELODIE L. LUCAS, DMITRI J. DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-14-2014
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-03-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 56761757)
DECLARATION RE DILIGENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELKRIS ASSOCIATES INC, DBA CREDIT BUREAU ASSOCIATES

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELKRIS ASSOCIATES INC, DBA CREDIT BUREAU ASSOCIATES SERVED APR-11-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, DMITRI J.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELKRIS ASSOCIATES INC, DBA CREDIT BUREAU ASSOCIATES SERVED FEB-21-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONSALVES, MELODIE L.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-03-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
